passages.excerpt:
My personal salvation was a lapidary work achieved throughout many steps, interlocking, in my life. I had to shed the poor rat, and acquire the fawn, via the (blood of) the lamb.

Synchronized with this in time were: the publishing of TEARS, with the dream; and: (macro) the fall of the tyrant.

"Tears"-- vide the libretto for Wagner's Parsifal. The role of tears to nourish and water and mmm vivify new life at Easter -- the tears of the repentant sinner is the psychropos, which brings new life.

Ruffie Rat; that's what Tessa calls herself, also without realizing how these lives live on from the past.

I think if seen in proper perspective, sub sepcia aeternitatis, we're like WIND IN THE WILLOWS, to God. ("A motorcar???")

I would like to add that my description (and memory) of what Pinky did in trying to heal me (lying on m[e] transversally) I now learn Elijah did to help restore the widow's sonx.

I guess the votive candle and the little saint helped. God consecrated reality right & left around me: miracle of miracles. I understand. Credo.

I have had in this one very small clue, but absolute: the sound of the bells, the Osterglochen. Christ arisen! The bells of Easter. This delineates it beyond....the sound of the healing bells which mean transformation (as in "Parsifal"). The wound closed. But only One, Christ, ever spoke through the Osterglochen. (And it was at that time of the year, too.)

So it was a vision.

I must never forget the bells.

I There is a direct connection between Thomas' presenc o, freed from the deterministic system. As long as I was there I'd continue to mechanically react. He was heisted out of other world, past or present; his own memories seemed to be if me C. AD70. This linked up with the actual world disclosed talk about "abolishing the power of this world"; isn't that easely what Thomas' imperviousness to the disinhibition timuli consisted of? They were overcome. This is a precise description of what happened. This freeing from this world. sonds - chains, while still being here; it continued the process set in mation by the "no" voiced to the taxes + again in 2-74 the "no" to this world + "Yes" to the other; the Xerox letter et al. Were a logical entension of this. Those were only the beginning; the astrologers still had to be proved wrong so to speak. Thomas" then can be regarded as an emancipated me, not a product of this world + not subject to it. Therefore I reason that a Thomas personality was essential for the process to move to completion - when - or wherever it came from That's what it was for. So we have a personality created by an atemporal event (the 1st Advent), a product of the archetype of the completion of the self (cf Jung). Perhaps the appearance of Thomas was a manifestation of something newly created, without true historical past (sort of like seegfried + Parsifal: untouched by the world). His only past was "in another place": the uroself such as wordsworth describes the newborn child as being, in his "ode" it was that self, recalling the prior world! + the 1:.618034 visions (+ others) were of that world - he returned there, as I will someday This is certainly what is meant by "being born again, "born from above," "born of the Spirit."

and opportunity, the latter if properly handled, the former if botched. Whether it will be endless repetition of prison or whether it will be, instead, self-liberation depends on what I call NFMD: the new free merit-deed which tilts the scales under altered conditions achieved by the GO situation. I cannot really abandon this theological concept in the service of upholding an explanation that relies on a belief in the paranormal powers of the individual involved. There is a cosmic dimension, and one of deity. The person has failed his first time around and is sent back. He is as ignorant the second time as the first...or is he? Doesn't his own bicameral voice whisper to him to liberate himself by an act of kindness unmerited by the recipient? There is the phantom solution A which did not work. Has the person really learned nothing? Then again he is destroyed by the instruments that destroyed him originally. This is unlikely. Surely there is a high probability that he will employ his disturbing power to save himself. This is how evolution is achieved: by making use of latent powers, making them actual. The B solution is a feed-back system that monitors the failure of A with the absolute wisdom of hindsight: knowledge that was crucial but contingent is now a priori and it is there, but buried in the person in the form of his original self grown old and then dead and then restored without memory: like Parsifal or Siegfried he does not know his own identity and must be told -- only it is himself, not Kundry or the Forest Bird who tells him. He is his own sibyl; he is in fact his own anima, watching over himself as psychopomp, hence now changed in sex to female, in accord with Zoroaster's observations about one's spirit of religion.

I created him because I create (my writing proves it). It's that simple. Create equals give birth to (Prajāpati reintegrates + reascends through creation). It is not Christ/love but God. It's not skepticism I have but pistis (I can't analyze). I am a fool in Christ, who is in me + loves the Father, + to whom the Father spoke (11-17-80). I am an adopted son, so I am a Christos. It is not my artistic ability, my intellect, my creativity that did it; it is my shrewdness posing as torheit. I figured out back in high school listening to "Parsifal" that if "Parsifal" existed, the Christ story has to be true (never mind the logic; it isn't logic: it's shrewdness). I assembled the evidence (the Bible, "Parsifal" + heaven knows what else) assembled -i.e. synthesized- + shrewdly guessed the truth: that (1) Christ is; + (2) is now. Hence I had pistis. (My radical epistemology fits into this, it, too, is (not logic) but shrewdness: "a guess uncannily close to the [hidden] truth." I was willing to hold any view that seemed true, logical or not; I went where my shrewdness led. Thus my whole religious world is aesthetic in nature.

"Parsifal" deals with the Son, it is penultimate, which I did not suspect. From salvation, blood + the cross to - agapē. From this world (2-3-74, the crucifixion) to the next (the Father + his love, not world). The blood + the cross are the highest point of this world. (2-3-74.) Then tears -"of the repentant sinner"- turn to agapē, as in "Tears"; the tears has to do with sin + atonement + Christ + the cross, but all this [sorrow] is a gate to: love. (V. "Tears"!) + love (agapē) equals ecstasy; so tears + sorrow -the cross- are converted into their opposite: joy. Through agapē; this is the goal + mystery of Xtianity, this conversion: utter sorrow (Mitleid) to bliss (agapē). This is "pity's highest power", it leads to bliss since agapē links pity (compassion) to joy - compassion becomes or even is (!!) agapē, + agapē ushers in joy because it (starting as Mitleid) ends up in God, since agapē is his einai. So compassion (Mitleid) is the road from this world to God; hence the crucifixion + the feelings engendered lead to God the Father because of the common element of agapē: this is the miraculous healing of Amfortas' wound.

It is we secret Xtians who are the phagocytes in the cosmic body, attacking the particle of iron - the BIP. + - the iron tip of the spear! All this is alluded to in "Valis" - the iron particle, phagocytosis, the hurrying Xtians, the spear, the blood, the wound! + the wound healed + closing. A clever reader of "Valis" will be able to put it together - i.e. the wound, blood + spear from "Parsifal," the BIP, the cosmic phagocytosis of the iron (metal) particle lodged in the cosmic body of Christ. spatial levels —each successive one according to how old it was— I was seeing time as space, which means that I had coverted time into space according to the quote from Parsifal, "You see, here time turns into space." Thus (if one wanted to) one could set up a cypher system by which a message could be read off at a glance, as set to ground (in other words in terms of spatial depth along this fourth spatial axis; but whether it is cypher or just the normal way the plasmate operates I have no idea; it may not be cypher at all but just its M.O.). The message lodges in a context that is not the same age as it; in other words set and ground lie at different depths along the fourth spatial axis. Apparently the percipient does not need to know the age of the different texts in order to see them lying at different depths; they will lie at their appropriate depths according to their intrinsic age, not according to the percipient's knowledge; this is the case because they actually are at these different depths, when time (age) is converted into space. If this is so, it is quite extraordinary, perhaps the most so of anything I've come across in this experience and exegesis of the experience. For example, a percipient who is able to see time as space (the fourth spatial axis) will see the word ASHER on the Linda Ronstadt albums as lying very deep, since it is an ancient Hebrew word. So a message can be put together involving it as a linking device. For example, when I looked at that page in TEARS I saw the word FELIX at a different depth from the words surrounding it, and this was before I knew that it is a Latin word as well as a name. I did not estimate the depth by the age; I estimated the age by the depth, by the various different depths. In my opinion someone or something is using this mechanism as a messagecarrier. What I have been called "the Acts lens/grid" is in fact the appearance in me of the ability to see time as space, hence age as depth. I stood in the antechamber of a world that is already long inhabited and well-utilized. This is momentous. Since the verbal integer (morpheme) sets its own depth independent of the particular knowledge of the percipient, the encyphering-decyphering (encoding and then extraction) is spontaneous. ASHER can be used (for example) to show where a message begins. It can be linked and relinked with morphemes of other ages greater than that of the inferior bulk-text. What it is linked to need not be the same age as it but only a different age from the inferior bulk-text.
